## SEL/SECL Governance Checklist

- [ ] This change keeps `LicenseRef-SEL-2.0` and `LicenseRef-SECL-2.0` distinct.
- [ ] This change does not claim SPDX or OSI approval.
- [ ] This change preserves ORCID attribution.
- [ ] This change preserves no-warranty and no-misuse-responsibility language.
- [ ] This change does not add attack, theft, fraud, bypass, unsafe surveillance, or criminal automation permission.
- [ ] Documentation remains school-safe and human-review-oriented.
